agents.backstory_hint: Methodical analyst who excels at gathering disparate data points from various systems.
agents.goal: Gather closed engineering tickets, support queue statistics, and financial spend data.

agents.backstory_hint: Clear communicator who turns raw data into human-readable insights.
agents.goal: Synthesize raw data into a narrative-driven report formatted in Markdown.

assumptions: The finance file in the shared folder is consistently named or easily discoverable.
The report is considered 'ready' when the Markdown file is created and awaiting the user's manual review.

tasks.description: Fetch closed tickets from Jira, ticket counts and categories from Zendesk, and the latest spend data from the finance folder.
tasks.expected_output: A consolidated dataset containing shipping info, support metrics, and financial figures.

tasks.description: Write a narrative status report as a Markdown file, covering shipping, blockers, burn rate, and customer escalations.
tasks.expected_output: A completed Markdown report ready for review.

tools.name: Zendesk API Client
tools.purpose: Retrieve support ticket volume and categories.

tools.name: Shared Folder Reader
tools.purpose: Read the finance data file from the shared folder.

tools.name: Markdown Generator
tools.purpose: Write the final report as a Markdown file.

workflow.description: Aggregate shipping status, support metrics, and financial data into a single, cohesive status report every Friday for review.
workflow.name: Weekly Founders Report
